Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0BF8 "LEAGUECHALLENGE-0BF8" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "League Challenge.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The true starting address is $0C00, where the code sets up various BASIC pointers, but crucially does not set the pointer to the beginning of the BASIC area ($2B/$2C). Because this game has this set to $3000 instead of the default $0801, the instructions to set this pointer have been added before the original code at $0BF8.
